data.title: CHAPTER 05 — READING A DATASET
blocks: The first move when a dataset arrives is to identify what kinds of things it contains. Not "what does this data mean" —
Chapter 05 — Reading a Dataset — There are five primary types, and they matter because they constrain what charts are even possible.

data.title: WHAT RELATIONSHIPS DOES YOUR DATA ACTUALLY SUPPORT?.
blocks: Comparison — Yes
Change over time — Yes
Distribution — Weakly
Correlation — No

data.title: THE THREE HONEST MOVES.
blocks: Find better data.
Reframe the question.
Acknowledge the gap.

blocks: Step 1 — identify data types.
Step 2 — whose question?
Step 3 — compared with what?
Step 4 — what does the dataset actually support?
Step 5 — the chart specification follows from the audit.
